sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's optimal f method: position size derived parametrically from historical P&L distribution using HPR(U) formula. Optimal f fraction calculated from empirical trade data regardless of distribution type. Specific f value must be determined from backtested trade stream.

source_rule_text: Position size is calculated using the HPR formula adjusted for the P&L of each trade, where the optimal f can be determined parametrically from historical trade data regardless of distribution type.
